summary: Decompiled nine fighter functions across Crazy Hand, Popo/Ice Climbers, and common fighter camera code. The PR replaced asm placeholders for three ftCh_Init callbacks, five ftPp_SpecialS callbacks, and ftCo_Rebirth_Cam, with supporting header/type additions. The automated decomp.dev report recorded 9 new 100% matches, +1188 matched bytes, and overall matched code moving to 56.88% (+0.03%).

key_files.role: Decompiled Crazy Hand animation/transition helpers and added needed extern floats/include.
Decompiled Popo SpecialHiStart IASA and SpecialLw enter/anim callbacks.
Converted fn_80122D2C placeholder comment into a declaration.

what_changed: Replaced placeholders for ftCh_Slam_Anim, ftCh_TagRockPaper_Anim, and ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015B670 in ftCh_Init.c. Slam now checks ftBossLib_8015C2E0, ftBossLib_8015C358, or animation completion, zeroes self velocity using ftCh_Init_804DA178, sets a fighter flag, clears x1A5C, and calls ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015A888.

ftCh_TagRockPaper_Anim now branches to ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015BC88 on boss-lib conditions and, when frames finish, changes motion state to 0x180 using ftCh_Init_804DA184/ftCh_Init_804DA180 before ftAnim_8006EBA4.

ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015B670 now changes motion state to 0x151, makes the fighter invisible, assigns accessory1_cb to ftCo_800DB464, calls ftCommon_8007E2F4(fp, 0x1FF), sets x2220_b3, and restarts animation.
Added ftCo_Attack100.h include and extern float symbols ftCh_Init_804DA180, ftCh_Init_804DA184, ftCh_Init_804DA1D8, and ftCh_Init_804DA1DC to support the Crazy Hand matches.

Decompiled ftPp_SpecialHiStart_0_IASA and ftPp_SpecialAirHiStart_0_IASA with identical one-shot cmd_vars[0] handling: clear the command var, compare ABS(lstick.x) against ftIceClimberAttributes.x80, update facing, and set part rotation Y to M_PI_2 * facing_dir.
Decompiled ftPp_SpecialLw_Enter to reset throw_flags, cmd_vars, and speciallw motion vars, enter ftPp_MS_SpecialLw, call ftAnim_8006EBA4, and install accessory4_cb = fn_80122D2C.

Decompiled ftPp_SpecialLw_Anim and ftPp_SpecialAirLw_Anim. Both clean up effects and callbacks when fv.pp.x2230_b0 is set, reset part rotation X, then transition respectively to ft_8008A2BC or ftCo_Fall_Enter after animation completion.
Added ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 at offset 0x80 by narrowing the prior padding, and added ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw with x0 and bitfield x4_b0 at fp+2344:0.
Changed ftPp_SpecialS.h from a placeholder comment for fn_80122D2C to a prototype with address comment /* 122D2C */.
Decompiled ftCo_Rebirth_Cam using UnkFloat6_Camera, fp->x890_cameraBox, ftCamera_80076018, fp->mv.co.common.x4/x8, and ftLib_800866DC to populate the camera subject.
smart_moves: Kept the PR narrowly scoped to nine functions plus only the structural/header additions needed for those matches.
Preserved separate ground/air Popo callback bodies instead of abstracting identical logic, which is appropriate for matching decompilation where shared helpers can change codegen.
Used PAD_STACK(16) and PAD_STACK(8) in the Popo functions where the diff shows explicit stack padding was needed.
Added a precise ftIceClimberAttributes.x80 field rather than leaving the threshold access as raw padding, enabling cleaner SpecialHiStart IASA code.
Modeled SpecialLw move state through ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw with an offset-commented bitfield, making future move-specific field work easier.
Re-fetched gobj->user_data after efLib_DestroyAll in the SpecialLw anim functions, matching the observed decompiled body and avoiding over-aggressive simplification.
Used existing motion-state and animation helper patterns such as Fighter_ChangeMotionState followed by ftAnim_8006EBA4.
Retained unresolved numeric/action identifiers and x-prefixed fields where the evidence did not justify semantic renames.
decomp_lessons: When a decompiled function reads a previously padded dat_attrs offset, split the padding and add the exact field, as done with ftIceClimberAttributes.x80.
For fighter motion variables, add a move-named union member with offset comments and bitfields when the function accesses move-local state, as done with ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw.x4_b0.
Ground and air variants may have identical internal cleanup or IASA logic but different terminal transitions; keep them separate unless there is strong matching evidence for sharing.
IASA callbacks often use cmd_vars as one-shot gates: check nonzero, clear the var, then process input thresholds and facing/rotation changes.
Effect cleanup paths should reset associated fighter flags/callbacks and part rotations before leaving the action state.
Camera-related fighter functions may require existing camera helper structs and even type punning on motion vars; do not force a cleaner type if it would lose the match.
Boss/capture-related animation callbacks can have early transitions triggered by both global boss-lib conditions and animation-frame completion.
naming_conventions: Crazy Hand symbols use the ftCh_ prefix; Popo/Ice Climbers symbols use ftPp_; common fighter symbols use ftCo_.
Motion callback suffixes stayed consistent: _Anim, _IASA, _Phys, _Coll, and _Enter.
Unresolved helpers retained address-bearing names such as fn_80122D2C and ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015B670 rather than speculative semantic names.
Unknown fields remained x-prefixed or offset-derived, including x80, x2220_b3, x2230_b0, and ftCh_Init_804DA180-style float externs.
The new motion-var union member used the lowercase move name speciallw, matching the move-specific field naming style in ftPp_MotionVars.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: PAD_STACK(16) appeared in the two SpecialHiStart IASA functions and the two SpecialLw anim functions; PAD_STACK(8) appeared in ftPp_SpecialLw_Enter.
A bitfield declaration, u8 x4_b0 : 1, was used for the SpecialLw motion-var flag at fp+2344:0.
ftCh_Slam_Anim used chained assignment of self_vel.x, self_vel.y, and self_vel.z to ftCh_Init_804DA178.
ftCo_Rebirth_Cam used a direct cast, *(f32*) &fp->mv.co.common.x8, indicating a type/layout-sensitive match.
The Popo SpecialLw anim functions reload Fighter* fp from gobj->user_data after efLib_DestroyAll.
Duplicated ground/air callback bodies were left in place rather than factored into helpers.
Explicit extern float symbols were added for Crazy Hand sdata constants used in Fighter_ChangeMotionState calls.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the provided slice.
The PR body test plan reported successful ninja, no ninja diff regressions, and all functions 100% matched in objdiff.
The decomp.dev bot confirmed 9 new 100% matches and +1188 matched bytes, plus a +4 byte .sdata2 improvement in ftPp_SpecialS.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename or explain ftIceClimberAttributes.x80.
Search for follow-up decompilation of ftPp_SpecialAirLw_Enter and the remaining ftPp_SpecialLw collision callbacks.
Search for later semantic names for ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015B670, ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015A888, and ftCh_GrabUnk1_8015BC88.
Search for other uses of ftPp_MotionVars.speciallw.x4_b0 to validate the bitfield meaning.
Search for *(f32*) &fp->mv.co.common.x8 or ftCo_Rebirth_Cam to refine common motion-var/camera layout.
Look for other Popo/Ice Climbers functions using PAD_STACK with identical ground/air callback bodies.
